pluginMechanism: context routing and sandboxed tool output

Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

This document provides a comprehensive read ledger of all routing-related source files in the Hono framework. It documents the purpose, key names, and a simple note for each file as part of a read/write endurance benchmark task.

---

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up routing with a default SmartRouter combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
- Names noticed: `Hono`, `HonoBase`, `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`, `HonoOptions`, `BlankEnv`, `BlankSchema`, `Env`, `Schema`, `methods` array (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH, ALL).
- Simple note: Constructor initializes router to SmartRouter by default with `[new RegExpRouter(), new TrieRouter()]` fallback configuration.

---

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Base module implementing the core Hono application class with routing, middleware composition, error handling, and fetch/request entry points.
- Names noticed: `Hono`, `HonoBase`, `Router`, `Context`, `Context` (execution), `compose`, `getPath`, `getPathNoStrict`, `mergePath`, `METHODS`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE`, `ErrorHandler`, `NotFoundHandler`, `RouterRoute`, `_basePath`, `#path`, `routes`, `notFoundHandler`, `errorHandler`, `#dispatch`, `#addRoute`.
- Simple note: Implements handler registration via `get()`, `post()`, `use()`, `route()`, `basePath()`, `mount()`, and request dispatch through `#dispatch()` which calls `router.match()`.

---

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module entry point for PatternRouter, re-exporting the router implementation from router.ts.
- Names noticed: `PatternRouter`, `router`.
- Simple note: Single file that delegates all exports to the implementation module.

---

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter using compiled regular expressions for route matching with wildcard and parameter support.
- Names noticed: `PatternRouter`, `Route` (type), `Params`, `Result`, `Router`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `emptyParams`, `#routes` (array of `[RegExp, string, handler]`), `endsWithWildcard`, `match` (regex pattern), `replace(/[.\\+*[^\]$()]/g, '\\$&')`.
- Simple note: Converts paths with `:param` syntax to RegExp patterns using `new RegExp()` and matches routes linearly through the `#routes` array.

---

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module entry point for LinearRouter, re-exporting the router implementation from router.ts.
- Names noticed: `LinearRouter`, `router`.
- Simple note: Single file that delegates all exports to the implementation module.

---

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter with linear search through routes, supporting star wildcards (`*`) and parameterized routes with `:param` syntax.
- Names noticed: `LinearRouter`, `Params`, `Result`, `Router`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `checkOptionalParameter`, `RouterMatchArrayWithIndices`, `splitPathRe`, `splitByStarRe`, `emptyParams`, `#routes` (array of `[string, string, handler]`), `ROUTES_LOOP`, `indexOf(part, pos)`, `hasStar`, `hasLabel`.
- Simple note: Sequential route matching with special handling for `*` wildcards and `:param` labels via string splitting and index-based position tracking.

---

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module entry point for RegExpRouter, re-exporting the main router and PreparedRegExpRouter with build/serialize helpers.
- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`, `router`, `router` (exports).
- Simple note: Exposes both standard RegExpRouter (lazy matcher building) and PreparedRegExpRouter (pre-built matchers for edge workers).

---

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter that builds compiled regular expressions from routes for high-performance matching with middleware and wildcard support.
- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `ParamIndexMap`, `Router`, `MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `checkOptionalParameter`, `HandlerData`, `StaticMap`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `match`, `emptyParam`, `PATH_ERROR`, `wildcardRegExpCache`, `buildWildcardRegExp`, `buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes`, `Trie`, `findMiddleware`, `HandlerWithMetadata`, `#middleware`, `#routes`, `#buildMatcher`, `buildAllMatchers`, `clearWildcardRegExpCache`.
- Simple note: Routes are stored in `#middleware` and `#routes` dictionaries, then compiled into a single RegExp with handler maps for fast matching.

---

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines types for RegExpRouter matching and provides the core `match` function that executes pattern matching against compiled matchers.
- Names noticed: `ParamIndexMap`, `Result`, `Router`, `HandlerData`, `StaticMap`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `match`, `emptyParam`, `buildAllMatchers`.
- Simple note: `match()` function retrieves pre-built matcher, checks `staticMap` first, then executes RegExp and maps indices via `matcher[1][index]`.

---

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter with pre-compiled matchers for performance-critical environments like Cloudflare Workers edge functions.
- Names noticed: `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `Router`, `HandlerData`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `StaticMap`, `match`, `emptyParam`, `RelocateMap`, `#matchers`, `#relocateMap`, `#addWildcard`, `#addPath`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`, `buildAndExportAllMatchers`.
- Simple note: Takes pre-constructed `matchers` and `relocateMap` in constructor for zero-overhead matching in edge environments.

---

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Defines Node class for trie-based pattern compilation used by RegExpRouter to build regular expressions from route paths.
- Names noticed: `Node`, `ParamAssocArray`, `Context`, `PATH_ERROR`, `LABEL_REG_EXP_STR`, `ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR`, `TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR`, `regExpMetaChars`, `compareKey`, `insert`, `#index`, `#varIndex`, `#children`, `buildRegExpStr`.
- Simple note: Trie structure with `#children` map storing child nodes, `insert()` builds tokenized path into pattern, `buildRegExpStr()` assembles final regex.

---

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Implements Trie class that processes path patterns, handles named groups with `{regex}` syntax, and builds the RegExp compilation graph.
- Names noticed: `Trie`, `Context`, `ParamAssocArray`, `ReplacementMap`, `Node`, `insert`, `buildRegExp`, `#context`, `#root`, `groups`, `tokens`, `paramReplacementMap`, `indexReplacementMap`.
- Simple note: Tokenizes paths, extracts named groups via `@\d` markers, delegates to Node for insertion, `buildRegExp()` returns `[RegExp, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap]`.

---

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module entry point for SmartRouter, re-exporting the router implementation from router.ts.
- Names noticed: `SmartRouter`, `router`.
- Simple note: Single file that delegates all exports to the implementation module.

---

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter as a router-orchestrator that tries multiple routers sequentially and adopts the first one that successfully matches routes.
- Names noticed: `SmartRouter`, `Router`, `MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `#routers`, `#routes`, `#activeRouter`, `activeRouter`, `get activeRouter`.
- Simple note: Iterates through `#routers` array in `match()`, delegates to each via `router.add()` and `router.match()`, catches `UnsupportedPathError` to try next router.

---

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module entry point for TrieRouter, re-exporting the router implementation from router.ts.
- Names noticed: `TrieRouter`, `router`.
- Simple note: Single file that delegates all exports to the implementation module.

---

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using a separate trie structure optimized for direct path matching without compiled regular expressions.
- Names noticed: `TrieRouter`, `Router`, `checkOptionalParameter`, `Node`, `#node`, `#children`, `insert`, `search`, `#methods`, `#patterns`, `#order`, `#params`.
- Simple note: Trie-based matching with `insert()` and `search()` methods operating on method/`path`/`handler` triplets.

---

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Implements Node class for method-aware trie routing with pattern matching, wildcards, and multi-handler support per route.
- Names noticed: `Node`, `Params`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `Pattern`, `getPattern`, `splitPath`, `splitRoutingPath`, `HandlerSet`, `HandlerParamsSet`, `#methods`, `#children`, `#patterns`, `#order`, `#params`, `insert`, `search`, `#pushHandlerSets`, `hasChildren`.
- Simple note: Queue-based BFS traversal in `search()` with pattern matching via `getPattern()`, supports multiple handlers per path via `#methods` array.

---

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test suite used by all router implementations, providing common test cases for basic routing behavior.
- Names noticed: `RunnerTestSuite`, `ParamIndexMap`, `Params`, `Router`, `getSuiteHierarchy`, `runTest`, `skip`, `newRouter`, `describe`, `beforeEach`, `match`, `task`, `suites`, `task.name`.
- Simple note: `runTest()` function wraps test suites, supports `skip` array for router-specific exclusions, builds `match` wrapper around router's `match()` method.

---

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Test suite for PatternRouter, inheriting common tests while adding PatternRouter-specific cases.
- Names noticed: `UnsupportedPathError`, `runTest`, `PatternRouter`, `skip`, `reason`, `tests`, `Duplicate param name > self`, `Trailing slash`, `GET /book/`, `match` (regex), `throwError`.
- Simple note: Skips tests for `Duplicate param name > self` (UnsupportedPath) and `Trailing slash > GET /book/` (allows trailing slashes).

---

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Test suite for LinearRouter, inheriting common tests while adding LinearRouter-specific cases.
- Names noticed: `UnsupportedPathError`, `runTest`, `LinearRouter`, `skip`, `reason`, `tests`, `Multi match > \`params\` per a handler`, `Capture regex pattern has trailing wildcard`, `Parameter with {.*} regexp`, `LinearRouter allows trailing slashes`.
- Simple note: Skips three tests due to `UnsupportedPathError` (multi-match params, capture regex with trailing wildcard, complex regexp) and allows trailing slashes.

---

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Test suite for RegExpRouter, inheriting common tests while adding RegExpRouter-specific cases.
- Names noticed: `ParamStash`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `runTest`, `RegExpRouter`, `skip`, `reason`, `tests`, `Duplicate param name > parent/child`, `Complex capturing group`, `static and dynamic`, `Capture Group`, `Including slashes > GET /js/main.js`, `Return value type`, `Should return [[T, ParamIndexMap][], ParamStash]`.
- Simple note: Skips `Duplicate param name` parent/child tests, `Complex capturing group`, static/dynamic path combinations, and `Including slashes > GET /js/main.js` (can't be added with `:label`).

---

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Minimal test suite for SmartRouter, inheriting common tests to verify router selection behavior.
- Names noticed: `runTest`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`, `SmartRouter`, `routers`, `newRouter`, `constructor`.
- Simple note: Uses `SmartRouter({ routers: [new RegExpRouter(), new TrieRouter()] })` to test fallback behavior.

---

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Test suite for TrieRouter, inheriting common tests to verify trie-based matching.
- Names noticed: `runTest`, `TrieRouter`, `newRouter`, `new () => new TrieRouter()`.
- Simple note: Direct test of TrieRouter with standard test suite.

---

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Comprehensive test suite for TrieRouter's Node class with detailed path matching scenarios.
- Names noticed: `Node`, `insert`, `search`, `Root Node`, `get root`, `get /`, `/:type/:id`, `comment_id`, `wildcard`, `Regexp`, `/[0-9]+/[a-z]+`, `All`, `middleware a/b/c`, `Special Wildcard`, `Default with wildcard`, `Multi match`, `Blog`, `fallback`, `Sort Order`, `Duplicate param name`, `parent/child`, `regular expression`, `star`, `Routing order With named parameters`.
- Simple note: Tests cover root nodes, wildcards (`*`), named params, regex patterns, multi-match handlers, duplicate params, and sort order with detailed expectations for handler arrays.

---

## Cross-File Checklist

### pattern-router
- `src/router/pattern-router/index.ts` - re-export module
- `src/router/pattern-router/router.ts` - RegExp-based pattern router with linear route iteration
- `src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts` - test suite with UnsupportedPath and trailing slash behaviors

### linear-router
- `src/router/linear-router/index.ts` - re-export module
- `src/router/linear-router/router.ts` - linear search router with star and param support
- `src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts` - test suite with UnsupportedPath for complex patterns

### reg-exp-router
- `src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts` - re-export module for standard and prepared versions
- `src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts` - compiled RegExp router with middleware and trie compilation
- `src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts` - core matching logic with staticMap fast path
- `src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts` - pre-compiled router for edge workers
- `src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts` - trie node structure for pattern compilation
- `src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts` - trie class for path tokenization and group handling
- `src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts` - test suite with UnsupportedPath for ambiguous patterns

### smart-router
- `src/router/smart-router/index.ts` - re-export module
- `src/router/smart-router/router.ts` - router orchestrator with fallback logic
- `src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts` - test suite using RegExpRouter + TrieRouter combo

### trie-router
- `src/router/trie-router/index.ts` - re-export module
- `src/router/trie-router/router.ts` - trie-based router with method-aware nodes
- `src/router/trie-router/node.ts` - method-aware node with BFS search and pattern matching
- `src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts` - comprehensive node tests
- `src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts` - test suite using standard test cases

---
